architecture.summary: The system integrates Large Language Models, Agricultural Knowledge Graphs, and Graph Neural Networks with a graph attention mechanism for plant disease detection. Information flows from domain knowledge encoded in the KG through GNN layers enhanced by attention, with LLM-based reasoning for symbolic interpretation and decision support. Representation learning and neural-symbolic techniques bridge learned embeddings with domain semantics.

biblio.title: Implementation of Large Language Models and Agricultural Knowledge Graphs for Efficient Plant Disease Detection

claims.statement: Graph attention mechanism achieved a precision of 0.94, a recall of 0.92, and an accuracy of 0.93
The system significantly outperforms traditional methods across key metrics such as precision, recall, and accuracy
The graph attention loss mechanism is effective in enhancing model performance compared with various loss functions

The system integrates Large Language Models, Agricultural Knowledge Graphs, Graph Neural Networks, representation learning, and neural-symbolic reasoning techniques to enhance accuracy and efficiency of disease detection
